subcodes.first_line: God willing, through the tender care of the All-Merciful, drink ye of the Wine of Life which hath been unsealed by the Hand of Divine Power [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله بعنایت رحمن از رحیق حیوان که بید قدرت الهی مفتوح گشته بیاشامید
subcodes.subjects: @Greatest Name, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @living waters; water of life, @suffering and imprisonment
